case_title: CORTES PATRICIA DEL SOCORRO VS JAMESON BOBBIE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY CORTES PATRICIA DEL SOCORRO AS TO DEFENDANT JAMESON BOBBIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-28-1990 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORTES PATRICIA DEL SOCORRO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JAMESON BOBBIE $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,028.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT JAMESON BOBBIE HEARING SET FOR FEB-19-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF FEB-19-1991, GRANTED

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORTES PATRICIA DEL SOCORRO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JAMESON BOBBIE $1,475.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,503.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT JAMESON BOBBIE
